issues.description: ReturnToHand target is incorrect. Card text says 'return 1 of your {Dressrosa} type Characters' but DSL specifies maxCost:3 with no subType filter. Should filter by Dressrosa subType.

Rest action should be conditional. Card text says 'You may rest this Leader and return...' indicating Rest is part of the activation cost/condition, not guaranteed. The entire action sequence should be optional via 'You may'.
